scores.correctness_notes: Covers all three notice types, deduplication/identity, ops event observation, and CLI usage. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issues: 'warning' listed as 'not in the enum' which may be inaccurate; `LazyNotice` type name and `repeat_after`/`expire_after` fields on Notice are plausible but not in gold standard — could be hallucinated details. `container.get_notice()` and `container.get_notices()` methods are plausible but unverified against gold standard.
